subcodes.title: Words spoken at home of Shaykh Salih in Abu Sinan, 1914-11-02
subcodes.first_line: Without [the aid of] a compass, he could draw circles. He did this using two equal, perpendicular lines
subcodes.first_line_orig: بی پرگار با دستش دایره میکشید دو خط متساوی و متلاصق مانند پرگار و خطکش
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
